overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses elevated walkways, descends stairs, walks under highway overpasses, and ascends a covered stairway while surrounded by towering buildings and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with teal accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across wet elevated platform toward large digital billboard

entered.detail: futuristic cylindrical pillars emitting bright teal light lining the walkway
tall modern building with glass and steel facade featuring pink neon signage
reflective wet concrete surface showing light reflections
massive screen displaying advertisement with man and text BOTTOMS UP

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an elevated pedestrian platform at night, flanked by glowing teal light pillars. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights as the character approaches a large digital billboard displaying an advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairwell descending from elevated walkway

events.description: transition from open elevated platform to enclosed stairwell descending to street level
character begins descending concrete stairs alongside building wall

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs on the side of a building, moving toward street level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking down stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase descending alongside building
dark concrete wall of adjacent building
large red digital screen displaying wide open advertisement with animated graphics

segments.scene_description: The character descends a concrete stairwell alongside a building wall, transitioning from the elevated platform to street level. A large digital billboard with red neon becomes visible as the character approaches the bottom of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban pedestrian street beneath elevated highway with dense digital advertising

events.description: emerging from stairwell into open street area beneath elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along street beneath massive elevated highway structures surrounded by neon billboards

tall digital screen displaying pizza advertisement with vibrant colors
covered stairway entrance leading underground with concrete canopy
multiple stacked digital screens showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath towering highway overpasses, the character moves through a neon-drenched urban canyon lined with massive digital billboards advertising various products. The environment is dense with cyberpunk architecture and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian stairway with fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering covered stairway structure from open street
beginning ascent up stairs inside enclosed walkway

agents.ego_description: ascending concrete stairs inside covered walkway with fluorescent ceiling lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian ascending stairs ahead in the covered walkway

entered.detail: enclosed concrete stairwell with roof and walls providing cover
bright linear fluorescent lights mounted on ceiling
large digital screens mounted on left wall displaying cityscape and ads

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stairway illuminated by fluorescent lights and begins ascending. Digital advertising screens line the left wall while the enclosed concrete structure blocks the outside city view, creating an intimate, tunnel-like atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape that transitions from open elevated walkways down to a dense urban canyon and finally into an enclosed stairway. It begins on an elevated pedestrian platform where wet concrete reflects glowing teal light pillars as the character approaches a large digital billboard. As the character descends a concrete stairwell alongside a building wall, the perspective shifts toward street level where a red neon advertisement comes into view. The scene then expands into a vast urban canyon beneath towering highway overpasses, moving through a dense environment of massive digital billboards and scattered pedestrians. Finally, the camera enters a covered stairway illuminated by fluorescent lights, ascending through an intimate, tunnel-like concrete structure lined with advertising screens.
